name: 片腕のザリガニ - one-armed crayfish
short_description: “Going against the grain is just another form of rebellion.” That's what high school student Yuta Nozaki believes, living by the principle of following the trend. Through his classmate Misaki Miyoshi, who constantly goes against the grain, Yuta begins to confront his true feelings.
detailed_description:
Title: One-Armed Crayfish

Content: Visual Novel Game

・About the Translation Patch

A volunteer has kindly created an English translation patch.

Please refer to the Community Hub.

※This is because we cannot include external links on the store page.

※We do not provide support for the translation patch here.

・Synopsis

“Going against the grain is just another form of rebellion,” says high school student Yuta Nozaki, who lives by the creed of always going with the flow. This approach allows him to live peaceful days. However, through his classmate Misaki Miyoshi, who constantly goes against the grain in everything, he begins to confront his true feelings.

・Game Overview

The scenario is a linear path with no branching, offering about 1-2 hours of content. There are no character voices. A key feature is that illustrations progress almost entirely through still images, without using standing character sprites. (See screenshots)

・Regarding Gameplay Commentary

Feel free to stream or record gameplay.

Thank you.
